org.arakhne.tinyMAS.network

Class NetworkKernel<AT extends Agent,ET extends Environment<AT>,YP extends MTSBasedYellowPages,MTS extends NetworkMessageTransportService>

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.tinyMAS.core.Kernel<AT,ET,YP,MTS>
      • org.arakhne.tinyMAS.network.NetworkKernel<AT,ET,YP,MTS>
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Runnable
    Deprecated. 
    See "http://www.janus-project.org"

    @Deprecated
public class NetworkKernel<AT extends Agent,ET extends Environment<AT>,YP extends MTSBasedYellowPages,MTS extends NetworkMessageTransportService>
extends Kernel<AT,ET,YP,MTS>
    Kernel of the TinyMAS application.

    The kernel supports network communications.

    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND <galland@arakhne.org>
